case_title: 840 VAN NESS AVENUE, LP VS. MAXFIELD WALTERS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 840 VAN NESS AVENUE, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTERS, MAXFIELD AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 840 VAN NESS AVE. #309, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94109, ** INCLUDES ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES **

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 840 VAN NESS AVENUE, LP AS TO DEFENDANT WALTERS, MAXFIELD AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 840 VAN NESS AVENUE, LP AS TO DEFENDANT WALTERS, MAXFIELD AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 840 VAN NESS AVENUE, LP SERVED AUG-27-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT WALTERS, MAXFIELD AN INDIVIDUAL
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF 840 VAN NESS AVENUE, LP

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 840 VAN NESS AVENUE, LP SERVED AUG-27-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10
